title: Pack of 8 Red Musical Whistle Christmas Crackers - 9.5" Metallic Festive Xmas Holiday Dinner Table Decorations - Family Game Novelty Fun Prizes Gifts Contains Hats Jokes
features: This festive box of eight musical crackers features a vibrant red and white striped design printed on a grey board, finished with white curling ribbon for a classic Christmas look that adds charm and colour to any table setting.
Each 9.5-inch cracker includes a party hat, festive motto, snap, and a musical whistle, combining traditional cracker fun with a playful interactive element that guests of all ages will enjoy.

The included instruction sheet allows your guests to play along with 14 well-known Christmas tunes using the numbered whistles inside each cracker, turning your celebration into a lively musical game.
Perfect for family gatherings, these musical crackers provide a unique and memorable activity that encourages group participation, laughter, and festive cheer around the dinner table.

Thoughtfully made with reusable components and recyclable packaging, this cracker set delivers eco-friendly fun that’s both entertaining and sustainable, making it an ideal choice for conscious celebrators.
description: Product Description Musical Christmas Crackers Celebrate in style with Harvey & Mason Musical Christmas Crackers, expertly crafted to bring elegance, sparkle, and festive fun to your table. Each set offers a luxurious design, classic tradition, and joyful surprises for family and friends to enjoy this holiday season. Crackers for Unforgettable Festive Moments Festive Fun with Gingerbread Musical Crackers Delight guests with six gingerbread-themed crackers featuring hats, mottos, snaps and a lively kazoo game. Includes six tune cards for festive sing-alongs, adding laughter, music and style to your Christmas celebrations. Musical Whistle Crackers for Joyful Gatherings Brighten your table with eight striped crackers complete with hats, jokes, snaps and a whistle game. Play up to 14 Christmas tunes together with easy instructions, ensuring festive fun for all ages while using recyclable packaging.
